info.title: Files.js.gripe API
info.description: Protected file upload, sharing, and administration API. Public /files and /files/raw links may be fetched directly; protected APIs, dashboards, upload results, setup, and admin pages are not crawl targets. Uploads use the R2 direct-upload flow: POST /api/upload/r2/init, PUT to returned presigned R2 URL(s), then POST /api/upload/r2/complete. The legacy POST /api/upload endpoint is retired.

200.description: Upload limits and account login paths

post.summary: Create an R2 direct-upload session and presigned URLs
post.description: Send file descriptors with clientId, name, size, type, and optional sha256. Anonymous uploads may be accepted when policy allows them; otherwise this endpoint returns 401.

200.description: Upload session, file ids, and presigned PUT or multipart part URLs

401.description: Authentication required when anonymous uploads are disabled

post.description: After each file or multipart part has been uploaded to the returned presigned R2 URL(s), send uploadId plus file records containing clientId, fileId, etag, and multipart parts when applicable.

200.description: Upload batch result with pickup code

404.description: Upload session expired or not found

post.summary: Abort an unfinished R2 direct-upload session
post.description: Cancel a previously initialized direct-upload session before it is completed.

get.summary: List files owned by the current user
Get metadata for an explicitly public file link

404.description: File not public or not found
